title: onobrychis visianii var. affinis
intro: Onobrychis visianii var. affinis, also known as a type of sainfoin or mountain clover, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Onobrychis visianii var. affinis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal medicine, Onobrychis visianii var. affinis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a dried herb or capsule supplement.
